_meta.notes: Hard-corridor consular intelligence. The patterns here are public knowledge (consulate websites, traveler forums, agency lore) but rarely codified in one place. Drift fast — review quarterly. NEVER auto-book against these portals; surface them so the traveler clicks through themselves.

ECU-ESP.label: Ecuadorian → Spain (Schengen)

alternatePosts.note: If Quito slots scarce — Spanish consulate Lima processes Ecuadorian residents with proof of legal status.

ECU-ESP.appointmentPattern: Slots drop in batches Tuesdays + Thursdays around 23:55 ART/ECT. Gone within 2 minutes. Refresh starting 23:50.
documentChecklist: Round-trip flight reservation (no need to ticket)
warnings: Ecuadorian residents pay no Schengen fee for children under 6.
BLS adds a service fee on top of the consular fee.

VEN-USA.label: Venezuelan → United States

alternatePosts.note: US Embassy Caracas closed; Bogotá is the assigned post but has 18+ month wait.
Some Venezuelans schedule here as third-country applicant — case-by-case acceptance.
US Embassy BA processes Venezuelan residents of Argentina; new $15,000 visitor bond may apply.

VEN-USA.appointmentPattern: No fixed batch pattern; check daily. CGI portal aggressive against scrapers — log in via traveler's own browser.
documentChecklist: Proof of strong ties to home country (employment, property, family)
$15,000 visitor bond receipt (Venezuela-specific, post-2026 rule — verify current state)
warnings: $15K bond is refundable on timely return but liquid only. Check state.gov for current bond requirement before applying.
Caracas embassy still closed — DO NOT travel there expecting to apply.
Third-country applications carry higher refusal rates than home-country applications.

IND-USA.label: Indian → United States

alternatePosts.note: Some Indians on H1B in third countries apply locally — accepted.
Lower wait times; common for Indians working in Gulf.

IND-USA.appointmentPattern: Wait times vary 60d–540d by post (Mumbai longest, Hyderabad shortest historically). Drop-in tracker websites unreliable.
documentChecklist: Employment letter or business registration + GST returns
warnings: Drop-box renewal eligible if prior US visa expired ≤48 months ago — saves the in-person interview.
Interview waiver categories shifted in 2024; check current eligibility.

COL-USA.label: Colombian → United States

alternatePosts.note: US Embassy Quito accepts Colombian third-country applications with proof of residence.

COL-USA.appointmentPattern: Bogotá saturated; Barranquilla has shorter waits historically.
documentChecklist: Bank statements + DIAN tax returns last 2 years

ECU-DEU.label: Ecuadorian → Germany (Schengen)
ECU-DEU.appointmentPattern: VFS Quito releases slots irregularly; check Mon/Wed/Fri mornings.
warnings: If Spain Schengen slots scarce, Germany is often easier from Quito for Ecuadorians.

ARG-GBR.label: Argentinian → United Kingdom
ARG-GBR.appointmentPattern: TLScontact Buenos Aires; biometrics appointments usually available within 1-2 weeks of online application submission.
warnings: Apply online first, THEN book biometrics — system rejects biometrics-first attempts.
Argentina passport holders are visa-required for UK; ETA does NOT apply.

VEN-ESP.label: Venezuelan → Spain (Schengen)

alternatePosts.note: Spanish consulate Bogotá processes Venezuelan residents of Colombia.
Spanish consulate BA accepts Venezuelan residents.

VEN-ESP.appointmentPattern: BLS Caracas erratic; alternates often faster.
warnings: Strong ties evidence is critical — demonstrate property, family, employment in Venezuela or country of residence.
